onboarding.stepLocationDesc: Enter your city to get local weather and region-specific advice.
onboarding.stepGardeningDesc: Choose your approach. This will personalize your advice.
onboarding.stepFertilizerDesc: What type of fertilizer do you use? This adjusts fertilization reminders.

home.title: Home
home.noPlantDesc: Add your first plant from the Garden tab.
home.streakAtRisk: Your streak is at risk! {{plant}} hasn't been watered for {{days}} days.
home.streakAtRiskA11y: Alert: {{plant}} hasn't been watered for {{days}} days
home.streakAtRiskHint: Tap to navigate to plant details
home.streakBadgeHint: Tap to see your streak details
home.levelBadgeHint: Tap to see your level details
home.harvestBadgeHint: Tap to view the full dashboard
home.harvestGoalA11yHint: Tap to see the production dashboard

streak.title: 🔥 Gardening Streak
streak.startNew: 🌱 Start a new streak. Water a plant today!
streak.noneWatered: No plants have been watered today.
streak.toKeepStreak: 🎯 {{count}} plant(s) to water to keep your streak!
streak.allWatered: 🎉 Great! All your plants are watered today!

chores.title: Chore Title
chores.titleRequired: Please give your chore a title.
chores.dateRequired: Choose a date for the chore.
chores.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.
chores.recurrenceHint: Note: the next occurrence will be created when this task is completed.
chores.daysInvalid: Enter a valid number of days.
chores.addPlantHint: Tap to create a new plant
chores.addChoreHint: Tap to create a new chore
chores.harvestDesc: Check maturity. Harvest regularly to stimulate production.

plants.name: Custom Name
plants.addTaskHint: Tap to create a new task for this plant

garden.title: Garden
garden.emptyDesc: Add your plants, seeds, and vegetables to start receiving personalized advice.
garden.bedFormLocationPlaceholder: Ex: South corner, Terrace, Against the wall…
garden.noBedDesc: Create your first bed to organize your garden
garden.bedActions: What would you like to do?
garden.confirmDeleteBed: Are you sure you want to delete bed "{{name}}"?

settings.title: Settings
settings.sowingMonthly: Notification on the 1st of each month

aiChat.title: Gardening Help
aiChat.emptyDesc: Consult our expert botanist for personalized advice on your plants.
aiChat.limit: 3 questions per day (reset at midnight UTC).
aiChat.permissionPhotoDesc: Allow access to photos to attach an image.
aiChat.permissionCameraDesc: Allow access to camera to take a photo.
aiChat.errorMessage: An error occurred. Please try again.
aiChat.emptyText: Diseases, watering, pruning, sowing, plant associations… Attach a photo for visual diagnosis.
aiChat.emptyLimit: 3 questions per day (reset at midnight UTC).

backup.title: Backups
backup.exportGDBDesc: Compact file, restorable in the app
backup.errorNoFile: This action requires a file. Use "Import" to restore from a file.

recommendations.gardenEmpty: Start by planting your first vegetables!
recommendations.gardenAhead: 🌱 Your garden is {{days}} days ahead — keep up this excellent care!
recommendations.gardenBehind: ⏰ Your garden is {{days}} days behind — increase watering and fertilizer.
recommendations.gardenOnTime: 🌱 Your garden is progressing on schedule — good pace!
recommendations.noHarvestGoal: Set a monthly harvest goal to track your progress.
recommendations.harvestGoalExceeded: 🏆 Goal reached! You've exceeded your target by {{excess}} kg — excellent!
recommendations.harvestAlmostThere: 🎯 Almost there! You need {{remaining}} kg more to reach your goal of {{goal}} kg.
recommendations.harvestGoodProgress: 📈 Good progress: {{actual}} kg / {{goal}} kg. Keep harvesting!
recommendations.harvestStarting: 🌾 Start harvesting! You currently have {{actual}} kg / {{goal}} kg.
recommendations.rainRecent: Recent rain ({{amount}} mm). No need to water.
recommendations.rainForecast: Rain expected today ({{amount}} mm). Save water.
recommendations.wateringMethod: Water at the base, ideally in the evening or early morning.
recommendations.frostRiskMsg: Temperatures near 0°C are expected. Protect fragile plants with frost cloth or bring pots indoors.
recommendations.heatWaveMsg: Temperatures > 35°C expected. Double watering, mulch if possible, and shade fragile plants.
recommendations.strongWindMsg: Winds at {{speed}} km/h. Stake your tall plants (tomatoes, climbing beans).
recommendations.harvestReadyMsg: Your {{name}} is in harvest phase. Check maturity and harvest regularly.
recommendations.mulchingSpringMsg: Now is the right time to mulch your beds. Use wood chips, straw, or dead leaves (minimum 10 cm).
recommendations.wateringTimingMsg: In hot weather, water early morning or after 6pm to limit evaporation.
recommendations.plantOutperformanceHigh: Your yields exceed regional average by {{percent}}% — excellent work!
recommendations.plantOutperformanceMedium: Your yields surpass regional average by {{percent}}% — good mastery!
recommendations.wateringNoWatering: No watering this week. Check if your plants need water.
recommendations.wateringOptimal: 💧 Optimal watering this week: {{liters}}L (adapted to current weather)
recommendations.wateringExcessJustified: 💧 You watered {{excess}}L more than expected, but it was justified by low humidity ({{humidity}}%).
recommendations.wateringExcessWarning: ⚠️ You watered {{excess}}L more than recommended — adjust for next week.
recommendations.wateringSavingSuccess: ✅ Successful water savings! You used {{deficit}}L less thanks to good humidity ({{humidity}}%).
recommendations.wateringDeficitWarning: ⚠️ You watered {{deficit}}L less than expected — increase slightly.
recommendations.healthNoData: Not enough data to generate a health narrative.

notifications.harvestBody: {{plant}} will be ready to harvest in {{days}} day{{plural}}.

predictions.recommendIncreaseWatering: Increase watering frequency in hot weather
predictions.recommendMulch: Install thick mulch to retain moisture
predictions.recommendFrostProtection: Protect sensitive plants with frost cloth
predictions.recommendPermacultureMulch: Increase mulching to reduce water needs
predictions.recommendHydroponicCheck: Regularly check water levels and pH
predictions.recommendPlantMore: Plant more to increase your seasonal harvest
predictions.healthLowMitigation: Check regular watering and stress signals (yellowing, wilting leaves)
predictions.healthMedium: Plant health is acceptable but can be improved (score: {{score}}/100)
predictions.healthMediumMitigation: Adjust watering frequency and fertilize if needed
predictions.wateringOverdueMitigation: Water immediately at the base of the plant
predictions.wateringNeverMitigation: Water generously at the base of the plant
predictions.heatWave: Heat wave ({{temperature}}°C) - plant sensitive to extreme heat
predictions.heatWaveMitigation: Create artificial shade (shade cloth) and increase watering
predictions.coldRiskMitigation: Protect with cloth or wait for warming
predictions.humidityRisk: Very high humidity ({{humidity}}%) - risk of fungal diseases
predictions.humidityRiskMitigation: Improve ventilation, water early morning at base only
predictions.commonIssuesMitigation: Regularly inspect leaves and treat quickly if symptoms detected

insights.startGardenDesc: You haven't planted any plants yet. Start with easy species like tomato or lettuce.
insights.highProductivityDesc: Your garden is very productive (score: {{score}}/100). Keep up your current practices!
insights.lowProductivityDesc: Your productivity is low (score: {{score}}/100). Analyze your least productive plants.
insights.productionUpDesc: Your monthly production is increasing. That's an excellent sign!
insights.productionDownDesc: Your monthly production is decreasing. This could be seasonal or due to cultivation issues.
insights.poorHealthDesc: Overall health is low (score: {{score}}/100). Plants may be stressed.
insights.goodHealthDesc: Your plants are in excellent health (score: {{score}}/100). Maintain your practices.
insights.highWaterEfficiencyDesc: You're using water very efficiently ({{efficiency}} kg/L). Congratulations!
insights.lowWaterEfficiencyDesc: You're using too much water for little production ({{efficiency}} kg/L).
insights.excellentSeasonDesc: You have very good seasonal production. Conditions are optimal.
insights.poorSeasonDesc: Your production this season is below normal.
insights.imminentDesc: The plant "{{plantName}}" should be ready to harvest in {{days}} day(s).
insights.starPlantDesc: The plant "{{plantName}}" is exceptionally productive. Consider growing more of this variety.
insights.highWaterUsageDesc: You'll need about {{liters}}L of water next week.
insights.permacultureSuggestionDesc: You could improve your water efficiency by adopting permaculture techniques.
